data.content: Plan: expose backward state edits from active workflow states by adding the queued companion state (ready_for_<active_state>) to validNextStates in both beat dropdown entry points (table + detail), then add regression tests for both implementations. Risks: duplicated helper logic in two components; mitigate by mirroring changes and asserting with unit tests. Validation: run lint, typecheck, focused tests, full test suite, and build.
